findings.h2_hold_request: 1 (APF should respond directly without forwarding to server)
findings.eventstream_result: EMPTY - no SSE events delivered (identical to #311/#312)

hold_request_analysis.expected_behavior: h2_hold_request=1 should prevent server forwarding and let APF respond directly with SSE data
hold_request_analysis.actual_behavior: Still returns 200 OK with empty EventStream, then GOAWAY kills connection
hold_request_analysis.hypothesis: Either h2_hold_request=1 is not taking effect for this template, or GOAWAY is sent before the response body (SSE events) can be written to the stream
hold_request_analysis.recommendation: Try h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) instead of GOAWAY. Keep-alive allows APF to write SSE events to the response body before closing. GOAWAY terminates the entire H2 connection before data frames can be sent.

notes: 3rd DeepSeek attempt. h2_hold_request=1 did NOT fix the issue. GOAWAY mode (h2_mode=1) fundamentally incompatible with SSE streaming - it kills the connection before any data frames are written. Must switch to h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) to deliver SSE warning events.
